payload.name: Kimchi 9router Patch Project
payload.description:
The user wants to create a shareable project at /Users/user/offline (bekas onedrive)/Documents/GitHub-offline/kimchi that:
1. Implements the 9router kimchi monkey-patch as a CLI tool
2. Is installable via npm/curl
3. Provides a one-command patch installation that detects 9router installation and applies the monkey-patch to custom-server.js
4. Can be shared on GitHub by the user

The user also wants Kimchi provider added back to their local 9router database with the monkey-patch.

Deliverables:
- package.json (npm package)
- bin/kimchi-9router cli command
- patch-engine (detects 9router path, applies monkey patch)
- README.md with install via curl/npm instructions
- Add Kimchi back to user's local 9router DB
- Ensure the project is git-initialized and ready forGitHub push

Files to create:
- /Users/user/offline (bekas onedrive)/Documents/GitHub-offline/kimchi/package.json
- /Users/user/offline (bekas onedrive)/Documents/GitHub-offline/kimchi/bin/kimchi-9router
- /Users/user/offline (bekas onedrive)/Documents/GitHub-offline/kimchi/src/index.js
- /Users/user/offline (bekas onedrive)/Documents/GitHub-offline/kimchi/src/patch.js
- /Users/user/offline (bekas onedrive)/Documents/GitHub-offline/kimchi/README.md
- /Users/user/offline (bekas onedrive)/Documents/GitHub-offline/kimchi/install.sh (curl installer)
